race.comment: CHATTERLEY (7) resumes after placing in Group company last time in. Wasn't pushed out in the two trials and has the class to overcome the sticky gate with the scratchings coming out. Expected to get off the mark. HELLABELLA (10) came out fast on resumption with a narrow second in a small field over 1100m at Wyong on a soft (7) track. Further improved for this and will appreciate the firmer surface. Go close. MAKE MINE MOET (12) Capitalist filly who popped up at Albury on resumption with a fast finishing fourth over 1175m at Albury in a Super Mdn. J Mac hops aboard and expected to figure prominently. LOREAL BELLE (11) even debut on the soft (7) track with a tiring fourth over 1100m at Wyong. In leading yard and can hold a forward position. Each way.
race.rail_position: 8m from 1000m to Winning post and 6m the remainder. (Pent: 5.55)
